name: Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 celery stalks 1 pinch Salt and Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the broccoli, then cut into half-inch thick slices.
2. Steam the broccoli in salted water until tender.
3. In a large saucepan, melt butter and sauté onions, celery, and garlic until brown.
4. Gradually stir flour into the butter mixture.
5. Slowly add milk, then chicken broth and herbs to the pan.
6. Stir over low heat until the soup thickens and boils.
7. Add the broccoli, salt, pepper, and chopped tomato (if using).
8. Serve hot. Top with almond slivers or chopped tomato if desired.
